name: ShCh-310
events: 29 Sep 1942 ShCh-310 torpedoed and sank the German merchant Franz Rudolf (1419 GRT) about 20 nautical miles north-west of Stolpm?nde (now Ustka in Poland).

30 Sep 1942 At 0028 hours ShCh-310 fires four torpedoes against the German merchant Annelis Christophersen (1581 GRT) about 35 nautical miles north-west of Stolpm?nde. All four torpedoes missed their target.
3 Oct 1942 At 1852 hours ShCh-310 fires a torpedo against ' what is identified as ' a submarine about 15 nautical miles north of Stilo (now Osetnik, Poland). The torpedo missed its intended target.
9 Oct 1942 Around 1230 hours, while on the return trip to base, ShCh-310 hits a mine and is badly damaged. She did however managed to return to base while running full speed on the surface.

6 Oct 1944 At 0404 hours ShCh-310 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 6000 GRT about 16 nautical miles west of Ventspils, Latvia in position 57°24'N, 21°02'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.

8 Oct 1944 At 0112 hours ShCh-310 torpedoed and sank the German dredger Bagger 3 (400 GRT) west of Ventspils, Latvia. 13 minutes later ShCh-310 torpedoed and sank the German transport ship Ro-24 (4499 GRT, former Dutch Zonnewijk) west of Ventspils, Latvia in position 57°24'N, 21°20'E.
10 Oct 1944 At 1515 hours ShCh-310 fires 3 torpedoes against the German tanker Hiddensee (643 GRT) west of Ventspils, Latvia in position 57°21'N, 21°12'E. All torpedoes fired missed their target.

14 Oct 1944 At 0158 hours Shch-310 attacks a convoy and fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 5000 GRT off Ventspils in position 57°18'N, 21°12'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
21 Dec 1944 At 0404 hours ShCh-310 fires 3 torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 7000 GRT south-west of Libau in position 56°12'N, 20°32'E. All 3 torpedoes missed their target.
30 Dec 1944 At 0324 hours ShCh-310 fires 2 torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 6000 GRT south-west of Libau in position 56°09'N, 20°26'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
2 Jan 1945 While still on patrol in the Libau area, at 0128 hours ShCh-310 fires 2 torpedoed against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of unknown tonnage. Both torpedoed missed their target.

8 Jan 1945 At 2334 hours ShCh-310 attacks a convoy and fires 3 torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 6000 GRT south-west of Libau in position 56°11'N, 20°28'E. The 3 torpedoes missed their target.
27 Mar 1945 At 0044 hours ShCh-310 fires 3 torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 5000 GRT about 30 nautical miles south-west of Libau. All 3 torpedoes missed their target.
10 Apr 1945 ShCh-310 possibly torpedoed and sank the German merchant Ilmenau (1201 GRT) off Libau. ShCh-310 is often credited with this sinking but she made no attack on this day !?

12 Apr 1945 At 0115 hours ShCh-310 attacks a convoy and fires 2 torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of unknown tonnage south-west of Libau in position 56°20'N, 20°18'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
14 Apr 1945 At 0118 hours ShCh-310 fires 3 torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 7000 GRT south-west of Libau in position 56°23'N 20°12'E. All three torpedoes missed their target.

22 Apr 1945 At 0036 hours ShCh-310 fires 2 torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of unknown tonnage south-west of Libau in position 56°24'N 20°22'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
24 Apr 1945 At 0042 hours ShCh-310 fires 2 torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of unknown tonnage west of Libau in position 56°30'N 20°16'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
